name: audio-manipulator-extension
description: A Chrome extension for advanced audio manipulation, including a graph-based equalizer, compressor, and pitch shifter, with real-time visualization and user-friendly controls.

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator ./dist --output ./dist --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal
